protocol.name: bobui_dmabuf_server_buffer
protocol.copyright: Copyright (C) 2018 The BobUI Company Ltd. SPDX-License-Identifier: LicenseRef-BobUI-Commercial OR BSD-3-Clause

interface.name: bobui_dmabuf_server_buffer
interface.description:
This protocol is used internally by BobUI for implementing the bobui_server_buffer extension on hardware that supports Linux dma-buf.
This protocol is not part of the BobUI API. It exists purely as an implementation detail and may change from version to version without notice, or even be removed.
